task_description: download the homepage of python.org and count the number of links
code:
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Download the homepage
response = requests.get('https://www.python.org')
html_content = response.text

# Parse the HTML content
soup = BeautifulSoup(html_content, 'html.parser')

# Find all link elements
links = soup.find_all('a')

# Count the links
link_count = len(links)

print(f"Number of links found: {link_count}")

```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Download the homepage
response = requests.get('https://www.python.org')
html_content = response.text

# Parse the HTML content
soup = BeautifulSoup(html_content, 'html.parser')

# Find all link elements
links = soup.find_all('a')

# Count the links
link_count = len(links)

print(f"Number of links found: {link_count}")

# Let's also check the first few links to verify
for i, link in enumerate(links[:5]):
    print(f"Link {i+1}: {link.get('href', 'No href attribute')}")
```

execution trace:
stdout:
Number of links found: 213
Link 1: #content
Link 2: #python-network
Link 3: /
Link 4: https://www.python.org/psf/
Link 5: https://docs.python.org

```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Download the homepage
response = requests.get('https://www.python.org')
html_content = response.text

# Parse the HTML content
soup = BeautifulSoup(html_content, 'html.parser')

# Find all link elements
links = soup.find_all('a')

# Count the links
link_count = len(links)

print(f"Number of links found: {link_count}")
```
